title: Create: ALL THE ADDONS
description: A Modpack That Loves Create addons and other Tech mods :P
body:
# Create: ALL The Addons
**A Modpack Based On Create Addons And Other Tech Mods**  
**Modpack Made By Masepl Studio**

  Step into a world where imagination meets innovation. Create: ALL THE ADDONS is a feature-rich modpack designed for builders, engineers, and automation enthusiasts. It combines the aesthetic and mechanical brilliance of the Create mod (with most major addons) with the high-tech complexity of Mekanism, the modular flexibility of Integrated Dynamics, Space Adventures From Ad Astra, and a curated selection of complementary mods to create a truly immersive tech-based sandbox experience.
  WARNING MINIMAL RAM IS 4GB , Recommended Ram Is 6GB - 8GB
